positive: A stylized, retro-futuristic portrait of a space explorer wearing a vintage diving helmet. The background features glowing nebulae and geometric space structures. Inspired by 1950s pulp sci-fi posters, detailed linework, vibrant teal and orange palette.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern, messy, watercolor
